name: Multi-provider selection shows correct AI badge in review and dashboard
description: When a user selects OpenAI or Gemini before analyzing a PR, the review report shows the matching provider badge and the History tab shows the correct badge in the AI Used column with working filter buttons.

planSteps.description: Two provider buttons are visible: '🤖 OpenAI GPT-4o' and '✨ Gemini Flash', with OpenAI highlighted as the default selection
Click the '🤖 OpenAI GPT-4o' button to ensure it is selected
Paste 'https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/1' into the PR URL input and click Analyze PR
Wait for the review report to fully load
The review report card shows a '🤖 GPT-4o' badge in blue next to the PR title
The history table has an 'AI Used' column and the most recent row shows a '🤖 GPT-4o' blue badge
Filter buttons 'All', '🤖 OpenAI', and '✨ Gemini' are visible above the table
The table updates to show only rows with the GPT-4o badge; rows with Gemini badge are hidden
